canonical_definition: The Social Bias Inference Corpus (SBIC) is a labeled dataset of social media posts used for assessing societal biases in language, which served as a source for the CoBia dataset.
papers: How to Protect Yourself from 5GRadiation? InvestigatingLLMResponses to Implicit Misinformation
Large Language Models for Automated Literature Review: An Evaluation of Reference Generation, Abstract Writing, and Review Composition
